parameters.content:
## Meeting Auto-Categorizer — Fireflies + GPT-4o-mini + Google Sheets

For teams who want every meeting automatically tagged with a category the moment it ends. When Fireflies finishes transcribing a meeting, this workflow fetches the transcript summary, sends it to GPT-4o-mini for classification, and logs one row to Google Sheets with the category, confidence level, and a one-sentence reason. After a few weeks you can filter the sheet by Category to see all Sales calls, all Internal syncs, and so on.

## How it works
- **1. Webhook — Fireflies Transcript Done** receives the meetingId from Fireflies on transcription complete
- **2. Set — Config Values** stores your Fireflies API key, Google Sheet ID, sheet tab name, and extracts the meetingId from the webhook payload
- **3. HTTP — Fetch Transcript** calls the Fireflies GraphQL API for title, date, duration, participants, transcript URL, keywords, overview, and action items
- **4. Code — Extract Meeting Data** cleans and structures the response — throws an error if the transcript is not found so the execution stops cleanly
- **5. AI Agent — Categorize Meeting** uses GPT-4o-mini (temperature 0.1) to assign exactly one of seven categories: Sales, Client, Internal, HR, Product, Finance, or Other
- **8. Code — Prepare Sheet Row** adds category and confidence emojis for visual scanning in the sheet
- **9. Google Sheets — Log Meeting Category** appends one row per meeting automatically

## Set up steps
1. Activate the workflow and copy the webhook URL from node 1
2. In Fireflies — go to Settings, Developer Settings, Webhooks, and paste the URL
3. In **2. Set — Config Values** — replace YOUR_FIREFLIES_API_KEY and YOUR_GOOGLE_SHEET_ID
4. In **6. OpenAI — GPT-4o-mini Model** — connect your OpenAI credential
5. In **9. Google Sheets — Log Meeting Category** — connect your Google Sheets OAuth2 credential
6. Create a Google Sheet tab named Meeting Categories with columns: Date, Meeting Title, Category, Confidence, Reason, Duration (min), Participants, Keywords, Fireflies URL, Logged At

nodes.name: Section — Webhook, Config, and Transcript Fetch

parameters.content:
## Webhook, Config, and Transcript Fetch
Fireflies POSTs a meetingId here on transcription complete. Config stores credentials and extracts the meetingId inline. HTTP fetches the lightweight transcript summary — no full sentences needed.

## Meeting Data Extraction
Cleans and structures the Fireflies response. Extracts title, date, duration, participants, keywords, overview, and action items. Throws an error if no transcript is found — execution stops cleanly without an IF node.

## AI Meeting Categorization
GPT-4o-mini (temperature 0.1) assigns exactly one of seven categories: Sales, Client, Internal, HR, Product, Finance, or Other. Returns category, confidence level (High/Medium/Low), and a one-sentence reason. Structured Output Parser enforces the schema.

nodes.name: Section — Row Assembly and Sheet Logging

parameters.content:
## Row Assembly and Sheet Logging
Adds category and confidence emojis for visual scanning. Appends one row per meeting to Google Sheets automatically.

parameters.text:
=You are a meeting categorization assistant.

Analyze this meeting and assign it exactly ONE category.

MEETING TITLE: {{ $json.title }}
KEYWORDS: {{ $json.keywords }}
OVERVIEW: {{ $json.overview }}
ACTION ITEMS: {{ $json.actionItems }}
PARTICIPANTS: {{ $json.participants }}
DURATION: {{ $json.durationMin }} minutes

Choose EXACTLY ONE category from this list:
- Sales: demos, proposals, pricing discussions, lead calls, prospect outreach, deal negotiations
- Client: existing client calls, account reviews, onboarding, support calls, client updates
- Internal: team syncs, standups, planning sessions, retrospectives, internal project discussions
- HR: interviews, performance reviews, hiring discussions, onboarding new staff, HR policy
- Product: product roadmap, feature discussions, design reviews, engineering, tech discussions
- Finance: budget reviews, invoicing, cost discussions, financial planning, accounting
- Other: does not clearly fit any above category

Return ONLY a valid JSON object with exactly 3 fields. No extra text. No markdown. No backticks.

category — exactly one of: Sales, Client, Internal, HR, Product, Finance, Other

confidence — exactly one of: High, Medium, Low
High = title and keywords clearly match the category
Medium = some signals match but not definitive
Low = limited information, best guess

reason — one plain sentence (under 20 words) explaining why this category was chosen.
